---
title: "NLFA_Snails_relative"
author: "Sophie"
date: "2024-01-23"
output: html_document
---

# Relative NLFA results of snails (%).
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
# Load packages
require(gridExtra)
require(Hmisc)
require(latticeExtra)
require(vegan)
require(multcomp)
require(car)
require(data.table)
require(asbio)
require(plotrix)
library(readxl)
library(rstatix)
library(broom)
library(lmtest)
library(boot)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(shades)
library(ggpubr)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE}
#Insert dataset
FA_Snails_rel <- read.table(file = 'C:\\Users\\sophi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Promotion\\Bioassays\\Schneckenversuch 2023\\FA_UFZ_Magdeburg\\Snail experiment\\Snails_relative\\FA_Snails_rel.txt', 
                      header = TRUE, sep = "\t")


View(FA_Snails_rel)
FA_Snails_rel <- na.omit(FA_Snails_rel)
View(FA_Snails_rel)
```



```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE}
#Run function one time, after that you can use the shortcut outlierKD (your subset, variable)

outlierKD <- function(dt, var) {
  var_name <- eval(substitute(var), eval(dt))
  na1 <- sum(is.na(var_name))
  m1 <- mean(var_name, na.rm = T)
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
  boxplot(var_name, main = "With outliers")
  hist(var_name, main = "With outliers", xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
  outlier <- boxplot.stats(var_name)$out
  mo <- mean(outlier)
  var_name <- ifelse(var_name %in% outlier, NA, var_name)
  boxplot(var_name, main = "Without outliers")
  hist(var_name, main = "Without outliers", xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
  title("Outlier Check", outer = TRUE)
  na2 <- sum(is.na(var_name))
  cat("Outliers identified:", na2 - na1, "n")
  cat("Propotion (%) of outliers:", round((na2 - na1) /
    sum(!is.na(var_name)) * 100, 1), "n")
  cat("Mean of the outliers:", round(mo, 2), "n")
  m2 <- mean(var_name, na.rm = T)
  cat("Mean without removing outliers:", round(m1, 2), "n")
  cat("Mean if we remove outliers:", round(m2, 2), "n")
  
  dt[as.character(substitute(var))] <- invisible(var_name)
  assign(as.character(as.list(match.call())$dt), dt, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  cat("Outliers successfully removed", "n")

}
```


## Create subgroups, to differ between FAs
### C08:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C08_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C08:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C08_0)
```



```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, results = 'hide', include = FALSE}
# Shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C08_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C08_0 <- na.omit(C08_0)
nooutlier_C08_0
View(nooutlier_C08_0)
```


#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C08_0 <- nooutlier_C08_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C08_0)

```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C08_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C08_0$FA_conc_rel ~ nooutlier_C08_0$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C10:0
#### Not considered, too less values.

///

### C11:0
#### not considered

///

### C12:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C12_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C12:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C12_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C12_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C12_0 <- na.omit(C12_0)
nooutlier_C12_0
View(nooutlier_C12_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C12_0 <- nooutlier_C12_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C12_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C12_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C12_0$FA_conc_rel ~ nooutlier_C12_0$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C13:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C13_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C13:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C13_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C13_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C13_0 <- na.omit(C13_0)
nooutlier_C13_0
View(nooutlier_C13_0)
```
#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C13_0 <- nooutlier_C13_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C13_0)
```

##### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C13_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C13_0$FA_conc_rel ~ nooutlier_C13_0$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C14:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C14_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C14:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C14_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C14_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C14_0 <- na.omit(C14_0)
nooutlier_C14_0
View(nooutlier_C14_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C14_0 <- nooutlier_C14_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C14_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C14_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C14_0$FA_conc_rel ~ nooutlier_C14_0$Treatment)
```

///

### C14:1
#### not considered

///

### C15:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C15_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C15:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C15_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C15_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C15_0 <- na.omit(C15_0)
nooutlier_C15_0
View(nooutlier_C15_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C15_0 <- nooutlier_C15_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C15_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C15_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C15_0)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C15_0 <- aov(nooutlier_C15_0$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C15_0$Treatment)
summary(anova_C15_0)
```
#### p=0.0415*
#### post-hoc test
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
TukeyHSD(aov(nooutlier_C15_0$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C15_0$Treatment))
```
#### Only Cip with Mix significant.

///

### C15:1
#### not considered

///

### C16:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C16_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C16:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C16_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C16_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C16_0 <- na.omit(C16_0)
nooutlier_C16_0
View(nooutlier_C16_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C16_0 <- nooutlier_C16_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C16_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C16_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C16_0)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C16_0 <- aov(nooutlier_C16_0$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C16_0$Treatment)
summary(anova_C16_0)
```
#### p=0.00214**
#### posthoc test
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
TukeyHSD(aov(nooutlier_C16_0$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C16_0$Treatment))
```
#### NC:Cip p=0.0071004
#### NC:Mix p=0.0085018
#### NC:Pro p=0.0103712
///

### C16:1
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C16_1 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C16:1", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C16_1)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C16_1, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C16_1 <- na.omit(C16_1)
nooutlier_C16_1
View(nooutlier_C16_1)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C16_1 <- nooutlier_C16_1 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C16_1)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C16_1$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C16_1)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C16_1$FA_conc_rel ~ nooutlier_C16_1$Treatment)
```
#### p=0.002279
#### posthoc test
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
dunn_test(nooutlier_C16_1, FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```
#### NC:Cip p=0.019030 *
#### NC:Pro p=0.002265 **

///

### C17:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C17_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C17:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C17_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C17_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C17_0 <- na.omit(C17_0)
nooutlier_C17_0
View(nooutlier_C17_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C17_0 <- nooutlier_C17_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C17_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C17_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C17_0)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C17_0 <- aov(nooutlier_C17_0$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C17_0$Treatment)
summary(anova_C17_0)
```
#### no significance

///

### C17:1
#### not considered

///

### C18:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C18_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C18:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C18_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C18_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C18_0 <- na.omit(C18_0)
nooutlier_C18_0
View(nooutlier_C18_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C18_0 <- nooutlier_C18_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C18_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C18_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C18_0$FA_conc_rel ~ nooutlier_C18_0$Treatment)
```
#### p=0.0024
#### post hoc test
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
dunn_test(nooutlier_C18_0, FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```
#### NC:Cip p=0.00187 *
#### NC:Mix p=0.00285 **

///

### C18:1
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C18_1 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C18:1", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C18_1)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C18_1, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C18_1 <- na.omit(C18_1)
nooutlier_C18_1
View(nooutlier_C18_1)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C18_1 <- nooutlier_C18_1 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C18_1)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C18_1$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C18_1)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C18_1 <- aov(nooutlier_C18_1$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C18_1$Treatment)
summary(anova_C18_1)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C18:2(n-6c)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C18_2c <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C18:2(n-6c)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C18_2c)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C18_2c, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C18_2c <- na.omit(C18_2c)
nooutlier_C18_2c
View(nooutlier_C18_2c)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C18_2c <- nooutlier_C18_2c %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C18_2c)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C18_2c$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C18_2c)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C18_2c <- aov(nooutlier_C18_2c$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C18_2c$Treatment)
summary(anova_C18_2c)
```
#### p=0.0114*
#### post hoc Test
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
TukeyHSD(aov(nooutlier_C18_2c$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C18_2c$Treatment))
```
#### NC-Cip: p=0.0101496 *
#### NC-Mix: p=0.0521
#### NC-Pro: p=0.06145

///

### C18:2(n-6t)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C18_2t <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C18:2(n-6t)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C18_2t)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C18_2t, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C18_2t <- na.omit(C18_2t)
nooutlier_C18_2t
View(nooutlier_C18_2t)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C18_2t <- nooutlier_C18_2t %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C18_2t)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C18_2t$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C18_2t$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C18_2t$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C18:3(n-3)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C18_33 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C18:3(n-3)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C18_33)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C18_33, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C18_33 <- na.omit(C18_33)
nooutlier_C18_33
View(nooutlier_C18_33)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C18_33 <- nooutlier_C18_33 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C18_33)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C18_33$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C18_33$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C18_33$Treatment)
```
#### p=0.01527
#### posthoc test
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
dunn_test(nooutlier_C18_33, FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```
#### NC-Mix: p=0.021058 *

///

### C18:3(n-6)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C18_36 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C18:3(n-6)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C18_36)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C18_36, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C18_36 <- na.omit(C18_36)
nooutlier_C18_36
View(nooutlier_C18_36)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C18_36 <- nooutlier_C18_36 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C18_36)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C18_36$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C18_36$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C18_36$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C18:4(n-3)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C18_4 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C18:4(n-3)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C18_4)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C18_4, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C18_4 <- na.omit(C18_4)
nooutlier_C18_4
View(nooutlier_C18_4)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C18_4 <- nooutlier_C18_4 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C18_4)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C18_4$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C18_4$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C18_4$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C20:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C20_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C20:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C20_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C20_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C20_0 <- na.omit(C20_0)
nooutlier_C20_0
View(nooutlier_C20_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C20_0 <- nooutlier_C20_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C20_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C20_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C20_0$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C20_0$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C20:1
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C20_1 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C20:1", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C20_1)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C20_1, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C20_1 <- na.omit(C20_1)
nooutlier_C20_1
View(nooutlier_C20_1)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C20_1 <- nooutlier_C20_1 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C20_1)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C20_1$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C20_1)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C20_1 <- aov(nooutlier_C20_1$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C20_1$Treatment)
summary(anova_C20_1)
```
#### no significance

///

### C20:2(n-6)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C20_2 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C20:2(n-6)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C20_2)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C20_2, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C20_2 <- na.omit(C20_2)
nooutlier_C20_2
View(nooutlier_C20_2)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C20_2 <- nooutlier_C20_2 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C20_2)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C20_2$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C20_2)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C20_2 <- aov(nooutlier_C20_2$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C20_2$Treatment)
summary(anova_C20_2)
```
#### p=0.00591**
#### post hoc test:
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
TukeyHSD(aov(nooutlier_C20_2$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C20_2$Treatment))
```
#### NC-Cip: p=0.03699 *
#### NC-Mix: p=0.0083896 **
#### NC-Pro: p=0.0218484 *

///

### C20:3(n-3)
#### not considered, too less values.

///

### C20:3(n-6)
#### not considered, too less values.

///

### C20:4(n-6)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C20_4 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C20:4(n-6)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C20_4)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C20_4, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C20_4 <- na.omit(C20_4)
nooutlier_C20_4
View(nooutlier_C20_4)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C20_4 <- nooutlier_C20_4 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C20_4)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C20_4$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C20_4)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C20_4 <- aov(nooutlier_C20_4$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C20_4$Treatment)
summary(anova_C20_4)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C20:5(n-3)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C20_5 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C20:5(n-3)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C20_5)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C20_5, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C20_5 <- na.omit(C20_5)
nooutlier_C20_5
View(nooutlier_C20_5)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C20_5 <- nooutlier_C20_5 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C20_5)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C20_5$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C20_5)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C20_5 <- aov(nooutlier_C20_5$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C20_5$Treatment)
summary(anova_C20_5)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C21:0
#### not considered, too less values

///

### C22:0
#### not considered, too less values.

///

### C22:1
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C22_1 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C22:1", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C22_1)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C22_1, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C22_1 <- na.omit(C22_1)
nooutlier_C22_1
View(nooutlier_C22_1)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C22_1 <- nooutlier_C22_1 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C22_1)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C22_1$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C22_1$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C22_1$Treatment)
```
#### p=0.0005701
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
dunn_test(nooutlier_C22_1, FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, p.adjust.method = "holm")
```
#### Cip-NC: p=0.00172 **
#### Mix-NC: p=0.001580 **

///

### C22:2
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C22_2 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C22:2", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C22_2)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C22_2, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C22_2 <- na.omit(C22_2)
nooutlier_C22_2
View(nooutlier_C22_2)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C22_2 <- nooutlier_C22_2 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C22_2)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C22_2$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C22_2$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C22_2$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C22:5(n-3)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C22_5 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C22:5(n-3)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C22_5)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C22_5, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C22_5 <- na.omit(C22_5)
nooutlier_C22_5
View(nooutlier_C22_5)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C22_5 <- nooutlier_C22_5 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C22_5)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C22_5$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C22_5)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C22_5 <- aov(nooutlier_C22_5$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C22_5$Treatment)
summary(anova_C22_5)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C22:6(n-3)
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C22_6 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C22:6(n-3)", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C22_6)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C22_6, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C22_6 <- na.omit(C22_6)
nooutlier_C22_6
View(nooutlier_C22_6)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C22_6 <- nooutlier_C22_6 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C22_6)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C22_6$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
bartlett.test(FA_conc_rel ~ Treatment, nooutlier_C22_6)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
anova_C22_6 <- aov(nooutlier_C22_6$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C22_6$Treatment)
summary(anova_C22_6)
```
#### p=0.0318*
#### post hoc test
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
TukeyHSD(aov(nooutlier_C22_6$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C22_6$Treatment))
```
#### NC-Cip: p=0.04749 *
#### NC-Pro: p=0.05070

///

### C24:0
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
C24_0 <- subset(FA_Snails_rel, Name == "C24:0", select = c(RUNINFO, FA, Treatment, FA_conc_rel))
View(C24_0)
```


```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = FALSE, results = 'hide'}
# shortcut for outlier

outlierKD(C24_0, FA_conc_rel)
nooutlier_C24_0 <- na.omit(C24_0)
nooutlier_C24_0
View(nooutlier_C24_0)
```

#### Median
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
median_C24_0 <- nooutlier_C24_0 %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarize(Median_FA_conc = median(FA_conc_rel, na.rm = TRUE))
print(median_C24_0)
```

#### Significance testing
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
shapiro.test(nooutlier_C24_0$FA_conc_rel)
```

```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = TRUE}
kruskal.test(nooutlier_C24_0$FA_conc_rel~nooutlier_C24_0$Treatment)
```
#### No significance.

///

### C24:1
#### not considered, too less values.

///

///

///

#### Now total SAFA, MUFA and PUFA comparisons
```{r, eval = TRUE, echo = FALSE}
# square root transformation to reduce the discriminatory power of dominant groups 
#FA_Snails_R_sqrt <- sqrt(FA_Snails_R$FA_conc)
#View(FA_Snails_R_sqrt)

#now checking of multivariate homogeneity of group dispersion - avoiding statistically significant differences from within-group variability (i.e., dispersion effect)
# bias.adjust = adjust for small sample bias in beta diversity estimates
#betadisper(FA_Snails_R_sqrt, FA_Snails_R_sqrt$FA_conc, bias.adjust = FALSE)
```


Median NLFAs in % of snails. Values printed in bold indicate a statistically significant difference relative to the control and asterisks denote p-value below 0.05 (\*), 0.01 (\*\*) and 0.001 (\*\*\*).

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width="500px"}
library(knitr)
include_graphics("median_relative.png")
```
